docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF VENUE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 395(B) (TRANSACTION ID # 210013829) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KANG, SOO BIN
